info.title: MGX Enterprise API
info.description: Public REST API for grain elevators and enterprise buyers. Browse anonymized inventory, place bids, read your team's trades and bids, manage cash bids, subscribe to webhooks, and read market prices. Authenticate with OAuth2 (Login with MGX). Seller identity is never exposed until a trade is paid on both sides.

tags.name: Inventory
tags.description: Browse and filter anonymized grain listings.

tags.name: Market
tags.description: Commodity reference data, current and historical prices.

tags.name: Bids
tags.description: Place bids, read your team's bids, and act on counter-offers.

tags.name: Trades
tags.description: Read your team's own completed trades.

tags.name: Teams
tags.description: Read the teams the authenticated user belongs to.

tags.name: Cash Bids
tags.description: Manage the elevator's own cash bids and their offers.

tags.name: Analysis
tags.description: Request grain sample analysis (graded by SGS) on inventory you own or manage, and read results.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Subscribe to event notifications and inspect deliveries.

get.description: Returns a paged, anonymized list of grain listings. Seller identity, farm name, and exact coordinates are never included.

parameters.name: province
parameters.description: Coarse location filter, e.g. SK, AB.

parameters.name: near
parameters.description: lat,lng,radius_km — radius search against coarse city centroids.

get.description: Returns the distinct commodities, grades, provinces, and crop years currently available.

post.summary: Place a bid on a listing
post.description: Places a bid on behalf of the authenticated user's team. Requires a user-context (authorization-code) token bound to a team. Send an Idempotency-Key header to make retries safe.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Same key + identical body returns the original bid (201); a different body returns 409.

get.summary: Get one of the team's bids

post.description: Accepts a counter-offer on one of the team's bids; creates a trade.

get.summary: Market prices, current or as-of a date

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Returns the price as-of that date instead of the current price.

get.summary: Get one of the team's trades

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Public cash bid id, e.g. cb_9Xa1.

get.description: Offers received on one of the elevator's cash bids. The offering party is masked until the resulting trade is settled.

post.description: Creates a subscription. The signing secret is returned once in the response and never again.

get.description: Returns the caller's own elevator delivery locations. Use the integer `id` as `delivery_location_id` when placing a delivered (non-FOB) bid or a cash bid.
Your own farms. With farms.read the response includes the farm name and coordinates; without it (e.g. an anonymous-submission platform) only an opaque id + coarse location is returned.

200.description: Paging object of the seller's own listings (full detail)

post.description: Creates a listing via the same core the MGX app uses. When list is true (default) it is published to the public anonymized marketplace immediately. Requires a valid payment method on file with MGX, and the listings.* scopes which are granted to approved partners (not self-service). The seller stays anonymous to all buyers until a trade settles.

403.description: No payment method on file, or the client is not an approved partner for listings access

get.description: Bids buyers placed on your listing. The buyer stays masked until both invoices are paid. Respond with POST /v1/bids/{id}/accept|reject|counter.

get.summary: Get one of your farms (full detail)

post.summary: Issue or refresh an access token
post.description: Exchange credentials for an access token. Use `grant_type=authorization_code` to complete the Login with MGX flow, `grant_type=client_credentials` for machine-to-machine read-only access, or `grant_type=refresh_token` to obtain a new access token (and a rotated refresh token) before the current one expires. Access tokens live 15 days; refresh tokens live 30 days. This endpoint is unauthenticated — the client credentials are supplied in the body.

refresh_token.description: Required when `grant_type=refresh_token`. The refresh token returned by a previous token response.

code.description: Required when `grant_type=authorization_code`. The authorization code returned to your redirect URI.

redirect_uri.description: Required when `grant_type=authorization_code`. Must match the client's registered redirect URI.

code_verifier.description: The PKCE code verifier matching the `code_challenge` sent to the authorize endpoint.

scope.description: Space-delimited list of scopes. For a refresh, may be a subset of the originally granted scopes.

200.description: A new access token. For authorization code and refresh grants, a rotated `refresh_token` is also returned; store it for the next refresh.

expires_in.description: Access token lifetime in seconds (15 days).

400.description: Invalid, expired, or already-used grant (e.g. a refresh token past its 30-day lifetime).

post.summary: Revoke an access or refresh token
post.description: Invalidate a token early — for example on logout or when rotating credentials. Pass `token_type_hint=refresh_token` to also revoke the refresh tokens associated with the access token, preventing further refreshes.

token_type_hint.description: Hint for which token type is being revoked.

get.description: Grading offerings and pricing. Samples are graded by SGS; MGX orchestrates and bills. Partner clients see the wholesale price.

get.summary: Get the analysis status and result for an inventory

post.description: Requests SGS grading on inventory you own (self-billed) or a seller your team manages (partner-billed). Emits analysis.requested, then analysis.sample_received, analysis.graded, analysis.photo_added.

409.description: Analysis already requested for this inventory

oauth2.description: Login with MGX (authorization code + PKCE) for user-context scopes; client credentials for read-only scopes.

scopes.market.read: Read market commodities, prices, and price history
scopes.bids.write: Place bids on behalf of your team
scopes.teams.read: Read the teams you belong to
scopes.cashbids.read: Read your cash bids and offers
scopes.cashbids.write: Create and update your cash bids
scopes.listings.read: Read your own inventory listings and the bids on them
scopes.listings.write: Submit, update, and archive your inventory listings
scopes.farms.read: See your farm names and locations
scopes.analysis.read: Read grain sample analysis offerings and graded results
scopes.analysis.write: Request grain sample analysis on inventory you own or manage

scopes.market.read: Read market commodities, prices, and history

Forbidden.description: Token lacks the required scope or eligibility

error.message: This token is missing the required scope.

errors.message: The quantity mt must be at least 0.01.

firm.description: Present on asking prices; true when the price is firm.

Quality.description: Non-identifying seller quality claims. All fields are optional.

Location.description: Coarse location only — province + nearest city. Never the farm name or exact coordinates.

quantity.description: The same quantity rendered in the `?units=` unit (defaults to MT). `quantity_mt` is always MT.

price.description: Single price for verified inventory. Use bids[] for unverified inventory instead.

quantity_mt.description: Quantity in metric tons. Optional if `quantity` + `unit` are sent instead.

quantity.description: Quantity in `unit`; an alternative to `quantity_mt`. Send either `quantity_mt` (always MT) or `quantity` + `unit`.
The same quantity rendered in the `?units=` unit (defaults to MT). `quantity_mt` is always MT.

counterparty.description: Null until both invoices on the resulting trade are paid.

quantity.description: The same quantity rendered in the `?units=` unit (defaults to MT). `quantity_mt` is always MT.

counterparty.description: Null until both invoices are paid.

quantity_mt.description: Quantity in metric tons. Optional if `quantity` + `unit` are sent instead.

quantity.description: Quantity in `unit`; an alternative to `quantity_mt`. Send either `quantity_mt` (always MT) or `quantity` + `unit`.
The same quantity rendered in the `?units=` unit (defaults to MT). `quantity_mt` is always MT.

counterparty.description: Masked until the resulting trade settles.

unit.description: Unit the price points are rendered in.

currency.description: ISO currency code for the price points.

secret.description: Signing secret — shown once, store it now.

WebhookEvent.description: The payload delivered to a webhook endpoint. Verify its signature with the SDK's webhooks.verify() helper before trusting it.

data.description: The resource for this event (e.g. a Trade for trade.created, a CashBidOffer for cashbid.offer_received). Counterparty fields stay masked until a trade settles.

farm_id.description: One of your farm ids from GET /v1/me/farms.

quantity_mt.description: Quantity in metric tons. Optional if `quantity` + `unit` are sent instead.

list.description: Publish to the marketplace immediately (default true).

quantity.description: Quantity in `unit`; an alternative to `quantity_mt`. Send either `quantity_mt` (always MT) or `quantity` + `unit`.

amount.description: Amount in `unit`. Null when a bushel view is requested for a commodity with no configured bushel weight.

price.description: Price in the currency below. Partner clients see the wholesale partner price.

analysis_types.description: IDs of the analysis offerings to run, from GET /analysis-types.

UnitsParam.name: units
UnitsParam.description: Unit for quantity values (and price values on market endpoints): mt (default), t = US short ton, bu = commodity-specific bushels, lb, kg. Bushel views require a single-commodity context.
